speaker: RIVERS
text: Have patience, madam. There’s no doubt his Majesty

speaker: RIVERS
text: Will soon recover his accustomed health.

speaker: GREY
text: In that you brook it ill, it makes him worse.

speaker: GREY
text: Therefore, for God’s sake, entertain good comfort

speaker: GREY
text: And cheer his Grace with quick and merry eyes.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: If he were dead, what would betide on me?

speaker: GREY
text: No other harm but loss of such a lord.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: The loss of such a lord includes all harms.

speaker: GREY
text: The heavens have blessed you with a goodly son

speaker: GREY
text: To be your comforter when he is gone.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Ah, he is young, and his minority

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Is put unto the trust of Richard Gloucester,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: A man that loves not me nor none of you.

speaker: RIVERS
text: Is it concluded he shall be Protector?

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: It is determined, not concluded yet;

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: But so it must be if the King miscarry.

speaker: GREY
text: Here comes the lord of Buckingham, and Derby.

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Good time of day unto your royal Grace.

speaker: STANLEY
text: God make your Majesty joyful, as you have been.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: The Countess Richmond, good my lord of Derby,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: To your good prayer will scarcely say amen.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Yet, Derby, notwithstanding she’s your wife

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: And loves not me, be you, good lord, assured

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: I hate not you for her proud arrogance.

speaker: STANLEY
text: I do beseech you either not believe

speaker: STANLEY
text: The envious slanders of her false accusers,

speaker: STANLEY
text: Or if she be accused on true report,

speaker: STANLEY
text: Bear with her weakness, which I think proceeds

speaker: STANLEY
text: From wayward sickness and no grounded malice.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Saw you the King today, my lord of Derby?

speaker: STANLEY
text: But now the Duke of Buckingham and I

speaker: STANLEY
text: Are come from visiting his Majesty.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: What likelihood of his amendment, lords?

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Madam, good hope. His Grace speaks cheerfully.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: God grant him health. Did you confer with him?

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Ay, madam. He desires to make atonement

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Between the Duke of Gloucester and your brothers,

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: And between them and my Lord Chamberlain,

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: And sent to warn them to his royal presence.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Would all were well—but that will never be.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: I fear our happiness is at the height.

speaker: RICHARD
text: They do me wrong, and I will not endure it!

speaker: RICHARD
text: Who is it that complains unto the King

speaker: RICHARD
text: That I, forsooth, am stern and love them not?

speaker: RICHARD
text: By holy Paul, they love his Grace but lightly

speaker: RICHARD
text: That fill his ears with such dissentious rumors.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Because I cannot flatter and look fair,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Smile in men’s faces, smooth, deceive, and cog,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Duck with French nods and apish courtesy,

speaker: RICHARD
text: I must be held a rancorous enemy.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Cannot a plain man live and think no harm,

speaker: RICHARD
text: But thus his simple truth must be abused

speaker: RICHARD
text: With silken, sly, insinuating Jacks?

speaker: GREY
text: To who in all this presence speaks your Grace?

speaker: RICHARD
text: To thee, that hast nor honesty nor grace.

speaker: RICHARD
text: When have I injured thee? When done thee wrong?—

speaker: RICHARD
text: Or thee?—Or thee? Or any of your faction?

speaker: RICHARD
text: A plague upon you all! His royal Grace,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Whom God preserve better than you would wish,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Cannot be quiet scarce a breathing while

speaker: RICHARD
text: But you must trouble him with lewd complaints.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Brother of Gloucester, you mistake the matter.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: The King, on his own royal disposition,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: And not provoked by any suitor else,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Aiming belike at your interior hatred

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: That in your outward action shows itself

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Against my children, brothers, and myself,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Makes him to send, that he may learn the ground.

speaker: RICHARD
text: I cannot tell. The world is grown so bad

speaker: RICHARD
text: That wrens make prey where eagles dare not perch.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Since every Jack became a gentleman,

speaker: RICHARD
text: There’s many a gentle person made a Jack.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Come, come, we know your meaning, brother Gloucester.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: You envy my advancement, and my friends’.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: God grant we never may have need of you.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Meantime God grants that we have need of you.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Our brother is imprisoned by your means,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Myself disgraced, and the nobility

speaker: RICHARD
text: Held in contempt, while great promotions

speaker: RICHARD
text: Are daily given to ennoble those

speaker: RICHARD
text: That scarce some two days since were worth a noble.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: By Him that raised me to this careful height

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: From that contented hap which I enjoyed,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: I never did incense his Majesty

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Against the Duke of Clarence, but have been

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: An earnest advocate to plead for him.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: My lord, you do me shameful injury

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Falsely to draw me in these vile suspects.

speaker: RICHARD
text: You may deny that you were not the mean

speaker: RICHARD
text: Of my Lord Hastings’ late imprisonment.

speaker: RIVERS
text: She may, my lord, for—

speaker: RICHARD
text: She may, Lord Rivers. Why, who knows not so?

speaker: RICHARD
text: She may do more, sir, than denying that.

speaker: RICHARD
text: She may help you to many fair preferments

speaker: RICHARD
text: And then deny her aiding hand therein,

speaker: RICHARD
text: And lay those honors on your high desert.

speaker: RICHARD
text: What may she not? She may, ay, marry, may she—

speaker: RIVERS
text: What, marry, may she?

speaker: RICHARD
text: What, marry, may she? Marry with a king,

speaker: RICHARD
text: A bachelor, and a handsome stripling too.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Iwis, your grandam had a worser match.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: My lord of Gloucester, I have too long borne

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Your blunt upbraidings and your bitter scoffs.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: By heaven, I will acquaint his Majesty

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Of those gross taunts that oft I have endured.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: I had rather be a country servant-maid

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Than a great queen with this condition,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: To be so baited, scorned, and stormèd at.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Small joy have I in being England’s queen.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And lessened be that small, God I beseech Him!

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Thy honor, state, and seat is due to me.

speaker: RICHARD
text: What, threat you me with telling of the King?

speaker: RICHARD
text: Tell him and spare not. Look, what I have said,

speaker: RICHARD
text: I will avouch ’t in presence of the King;

speaker: RICHARD
text: I dare adventure to be sent to th’ Tower.

speaker: RICHARD
text: ’Tis time to speak. My pains are quite forgot.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Out, devil! I do remember them too well:

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Thou killed’st my husband Henry in the Tower,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And Edward, my poor son, at Tewkesbury.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Ere you were queen, ay, or your husband king,

speaker: RICHARD
text: I was a packhorse in his great affairs,

speaker: RICHARD
text: A weeder-out of his proud adversaries,

speaker: RICHARD
text: A liberal rewarder of his friends.

speaker: RICHARD
text: To royalize his blood, I spent mine own.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Ay, and much better blood than his or thine.

speaker: RICHARD
text: In all which time, you and your husband Grey

speaker: RICHARD
text: Were factious for the House of Lancaster.—

speaker: RICHARD
text: And, Rivers, so were you.—Was not your husband

speaker: RICHARD
text: In Margaret’s battle at Saint Albans slain?

speaker: RICHARD
text: Let me put in your minds, if you forget,

speaker: RICHARD
text: What you have been ere this, and what you are;

speaker: RICHARD
text: Withal, what I have been, and what I am.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: A murd’rous villain, and so still thou art.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Poor Clarence did forsake his father Warwick,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Ay, and forswore himself—which Jesu pardon!—

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Which God revenge!

speaker: RICHARD
text: To fight on Edward’s party for the crown;

speaker: RICHARD
text: And for his meed, poor lord, he is mewed up.

speaker: RICHARD
text: I would to God my heart were flint, like Edward’s,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Or Edward’s soft and pitiful, like mine.

speaker: RICHARD
text: I am too childish-foolish for this world.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Hie thee to hell for shame, and leave this world,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Thou cacodemon! There thy kingdom is.

speaker: RIVERS
text: My lord of Gloucester, in those busy days

speaker: RIVERS
text: Which here you urge to prove us enemies,

speaker: RIVERS
text: We followed then our lord, our sovereign king.

speaker: RIVERS
text: So should we you, if you should be our king.

speaker: RICHARD
text: If I should be? I had rather be a peddler.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Far be it from my heart, the thought thereof.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: As little joy, my lord, as you suppose

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: You should enjoy were you this country’s king,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: As little joy you may suppose in me

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: That I enjoy, being the queen thereof.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: As little joy enjoys the queen thereof,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: For I am she, and altogether joyless.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: I can no longer hold me patient.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Hear me, you wrangling pirates, that fall out

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: In sharing that which you have pilled from me!

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Which of you trembles not that looks on me?

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: If not, that I am queen, you bow like subjects,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Yet that, by you deposed, you quake like rebels.—

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Ah, gentle villain, do not turn away.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Foul, wrinkled witch, what mak’st thou in my sight?

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: But repetition of what thou hast marred.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: That will I make before I let thee go.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Wert thou not banishèd on pain of death?

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: I was, but I do find more pain in banishment

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Than death can yield me here by my abode.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: A husband and a son thou ow’st to me;

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text:
To
                 
                Queen
                 
                Elizabeth
                .
                 
              And thou a kingdom;—all of you, allegiance.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: This sorrow that I have by right is yours,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And all the pleasures you usurp are mine.

speaker: RICHARD
text: The curse my noble father laid on thee

speaker: RICHARD
text: When thou didst crown his warlike brows with paper,

speaker: RICHARD
text: And with thy scorns drew’st rivers from his eyes,

speaker: RICHARD
text: And then, to dry them, gav’st the Duke a clout

speaker: RICHARD
text: Steeped in the faultless blood of pretty Rutland—

speaker: RICHARD
text: His curses then, from bitterness of soul

speaker: RICHARD
text: Denounced against thee, are all fall’n upon thee,

speaker: RICHARD
text: And God, not we, hath plagued thy bloody deed.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: So just is God to right the innocent.

speaker: HASTINGS
text: O, ’twas the foulest deed to slay that babe,

speaker: HASTINGS
text: And the most merciless that e’er was heard of!

speaker: RIVERS
text: Tyrants themselves wept when it was reported.

speaker: DORSET
text: No man but prophesied revenge for it.

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Northumberland, then present, wept to see it.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: What, were you snarling all before I came,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Ready to catch each other by the throat,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And turn you all your hatred now on me?

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Did York’s dread curse prevail so much with heaven

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: That Henry’s death, my lovely Edward’s death,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Their kingdom’s loss, my woeful banishment,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Should all but answer for that peevish brat?

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Can curses pierce the clouds and enter heaven?

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Why then, give way, dull clouds, to my quick curses!

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Though not by war, by surfeit die your king,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: As ours by murder to make him a king.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text:
To
                 
                Queen
                 
                Elizabeth
                .
                 
              Edward thy son, that now is Prince of Wales,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: For Edward our son, that was Prince of Wales,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Die in his youth by like untimely violence.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Thyself a queen, for me that was a queen,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Outlive thy glory, like my wretched self.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Long mayst thou live to wail thy children’s death

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And see another, as I see thee now,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Decked in thy rights, as thou art stalled in mine.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Long die thy happy days before thy death,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And, after many lengthened hours of grief,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Die neither mother, wife, nor England’s queen.—

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Rivers and Dorset, you were standers-by,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And so wast thou, Lord Hastings, when my son

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Was stabbed with bloody daggers. God I pray Him

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: That none of you may live his natural age,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: But by some unlooked accident cut off.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Have done thy charm, thou hateful, withered hag.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And leave out thee? Stay, dog, for thou shalt hear me.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: If heaven have any grievous plague in store

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Exceeding those that I can wish upon thee,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: O, let them keep it till thy sins be ripe

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And then hurl down their indignation

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: On thee, the troubler of the poor world’s peace.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: The worm of conscience still begnaw thy soul.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Thy friends suspect for traitors while thou liv’st,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And take deep traitors for thy dearest friends.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: No sleep close up that deadly eye of thine,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Unless it be while some tormenting dream

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Affrights thee with a hell of ugly devils.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Thou elvish-marked, abortive, rooting hog,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Thou that wast sealed in thy nativity

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: The slave of nature and the son of hell,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Thou slander of thy heavy mother’s womb,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Thou loathèd issue of thy father’s loins,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Thou rag of honor, thou detested—

speaker: RICHARD
text: Margaret.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Richard!

speaker: RICHARD
text: Ha?

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: I call thee not.

speaker: RICHARD
text: I cry thee mercy, then, for I did think

speaker: RICHARD
text: That thou hadst called me all these bitter names.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Why, so I did, but looked for no reply.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: O, let me make the period to my curse!

speaker: RICHARD
text: ’Tis done by me and ends in “Margaret.”

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Thus have you breathed your curse against yourself.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Poor painted queen, vain flourish of my fortune,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Why strew’st thou sugar on that bottled spider,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Whose deadly web ensnareth thee about?

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Fool, fool, thou whet’st a knife to kill thyself.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: The day will come that thou shalt wish for me

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: To help thee curse this poisonous bunch-backed toad.

speaker: HASTINGS
text: False-boding woman, end thy frantic curse,

speaker: HASTINGS
text: Lest to thy harm thou move our patience.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Foul shame upon you, you have all moved mine.

speaker: RIVERS
text: Were you well served, you would be taught your duty.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: To serve me well, you all should do me duty:

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Teach me to be your queen, and you my subjects.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: O, serve me well, and teach yourselves that duty!

speaker: DORSET
text: Dispute not with her; she is lunatic.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Peace, Master Marquess, you are malapert.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Your fire-new stamp of honor is scarce current.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: O, that your young nobility could judge

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: What ’twere to lose it and be miserable!

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: They that stand high have many blasts to shake them,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And if they fall, they dash themselves to pieces.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Good counsel, marry.—Learn it, learn it, marquess.

speaker: DORSET
text: It touches you, my lord, as much as me.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Ay, and much more; but I was born so high.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Our aerie buildeth in the cedar’s top,

speaker: RICHARD
text: And dallies with the wind and scorns the sun.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And turns the sun to shade. Alas, alas,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Witness my son, now in the shade of death,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Whose bright out-shining beams thy cloudy wrath

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Hath in eternal darkness folded up.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Your aerie buildeth in our aerie’s nest.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: O God, that seest it, do not suffer it!

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: As it is won with blood, lost be it so.

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Peace, peace, for shame, if not for charity.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Urge neither charity nor shame to me.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text:
Addressing
                 
                the
                 
                others
                .
                 
              Uncharitably with me have you dealt,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And shamefully my hopes by you are butchered.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: My charity is outrage, life my shame,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And in that shame still live my sorrows’ rage.

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Have done, have done.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: O princely Buckingham, I’ll kiss thy hand

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: In sign of league and amity with thee.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Now fair befall thee and thy noble house!

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Thy garments are not spotted with our blood,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Nor thou within the compass of my curse.

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Nor no one here, for curses never pass

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: The lips of those that breathe them in the air.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: I will not think but they ascend the sky,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And there awake God’s gentle sleeping peace.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text:
Aside
                 
                to
                 
                Buckingham
                .
                 
              O Buckingham, take heed of yonder dog!

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Look when he fawns, he bites; and when he bites,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: His venom tooth will rankle to the death.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Have not to do with him. Beware of him.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Sin, death, and hell have set their marks on him,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And all their ministers attend on him.

speaker: RICHARD
text: What doth she say, my lord of Buckingham?

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: Nothing that I respect, my gracious lord.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: What, dost thou scorn me for my gentle counsel,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And soothe the devil that I warn thee from?

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: O, but remember this another day,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: When he shall split thy very heart with sorrow,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And say poor Margaret was a prophetess.—

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: Live each of you the subjects to his hate,

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              MARGARET
text: And he to yours, and all of you to God’s.

speaker: BUCKINGHAM
text: My hair doth stand an end to hear her curses.

speaker: RIVERS
text: And so doth mine. I muse why she’s at liberty.

speaker: RICHARD
text: I cannot blame her. By God’s holy mother,

speaker: RICHARD
text: She hath had too much wrong, and I repent

speaker: RICHARD
text: My part thereof that I have done to her.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: I never did her any, to my knowledge.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Yet you have all the vantage of her wrong.

speaker: RICHARD
text: I was too hot to do somebody good

speaker: RICHARD
text: That is too cold in thinking of it now.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Marry, as for Clarence, he is well repaid;

speaker: RICHARD
text: He is franked up to fatting for his pains.

speaker: RICHARD
text: God pardon them that are the cause thereof.

speaker: RIVERS
text: A virtuous and a Christian-like conclusion

speaker: RIVERS
text: To pray for them that have done scathe to us.

speaker: RICHARD
text:
So do I ever—
                (
                speaks
                 
                to
                 
                himself
                )
                 
              being well advised,

speaker: RICHARD
text: For had I cursed now, I had cursed myself.

speaker: CATESBY
text: Madam, his Majesty doth call for you,—

speaker: CATESBY
text: And for your Grace,—and yours, my gracious lords.

speaker:
QUEEN
               
              ELIZABETH
text: Catesby, I come.—Lords, will you go with me?

speaker: RIVERS
text: We wait upon your Grace.

speaker: RICHARD
text: I do the wrong and first begin to brawl.

speaker: RICHARD
text: The secret mischiefs that I set abroach

speaker: RICHARD
text: I lay unto the grievous charge of others.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Clarence, who I indeed have cast in darkness,

speaker: RICHARD
text: I do beweep to many simple gulls,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Namely, to Derby, Hastings, Buckingham,

speaker: RICHARD
text: And tell them ’tis the Queen and her allies

speaker: RICHARD
text: That stir the King against the Duke my brother.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Now they believe it and withal whet me

speaker: RICHARD
text: To be revenged on Rivers, Dorset, Grey;

speaker: RICHARD
text: But then I sigh and, with a piece of scripture,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Tell them that God bids us do good for evil;

speaker: RICHARD
text: And thus I clothe my naked villainy

speaker: RICHARD
text: With odd old ends stol’n forth of Holy Writ,

speaker: RICHARD
text: And seem a saint when most I play the devil.

speaker: RICHARD
text: But soft, here come my executioners.—

speaker: RICHARD
text: How now, my hardy, stout, resolvèd mates?

speaker: RICHARD
text: Are you now going to dispatch this thing?

speaker: MURDERER
text: We are, my lord, and come to have the warrant

speaker: MURDERER
text: That we may be admitted where he is.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Well thought upon. I have it here about me.

speaker: RICHARD
text: When you have done, repair to Crosby Place.

speaker: RICHARD
text: But, sirs, be sudden in the execution,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Withal obdurate; do not hear him plead,

speaker: RICHARD
text: For Clarence is well-spoken and perhaps

speaker: RICHARD
text: May move your hearts to pity if you mark him.

speaker: MURDERER
text: Tut, tut, my lord, we will not stand to prate.

speaker: MURDERER
text: Talkers are no good doers. Be assured

speaker: MURDERER
text: We go to use our hands and not our tongues.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Your eyes drop millstones when fools’ eyes fall tears.

speaker: RICHARD
text: I like you lads. About your business straight.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Go, go, dispatch.

speaker: MURDERERS
text: We will, my noble lord.
